step_rationale: Primary bile acid; systemic gut-liver-heart axis; off-pathway.
mechanism: TCDCA is a primary bile acid altered in acute coronary syndrome metabolism, reflecting systemic dysregulation via the enterohepatic circulation.

references.title: Plasma metabolomic profiling of patients with acute coronary syndrome treated with potent platelet inhibitors.
Genetic mapping of serum metabolome to chronic diseases among Han Chinese.
